changes.before: The hum lived behind her eyes and in her jaw, too deep to ignore.
changes.after: It vibrated behind her eyes and in her jaw, too deep to ignore.

changes.before: They listened, took notes, and asked the sort of questions that ended in drawers.
changes.after: They listened, took notes, and asked the sort of questions officers filed away in drawers.

changes.before: Jaina stood too fast. Stiff legs told on her.
changes.after: Jaina stood too fast, and the hitch in her legs showed.

changes.before: "Because the contamination does not care who signed off on it."
changes.after: "Because the contamination keeps spreading regardless of permission."

changes.before: Fear made the choice before thought could.
changes.after: She cast before she had time to think.

changes.before: The corruption had crossed from line to land.
Farm after farm sat with its doors shut and no smoke rising, the emptied stillness of places where people had stopped coming out long before sunset.
changes.after: Farm after farm sat with its doors shut and no smoke rising.

changes.before: Then the village showed through the last of the trees, cold hearths, no smoke, stillness where evening life should have been.
changes.after: Then the village showed through the last of the trees, cold hearths, no smoke, no movement at all.
